data.title: Dai Nippon Printing Co. Reports Mixed Financial Results
data.description:
Dai Nippon Printing Co ( (DNPCF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Dai Nippon Printing Co presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Dai Nippon Printing Co., Ltd. is a prominent player in the printing industry, offering a wide range of services and products across various sectors, including smart communication, life & healthcare, and electronics.

In its latest earnings report for the first six months ending September 30, 2025, Dai Nippon Printing Co. reported a 4.3% increase in net sales compared to the same period last year, reaching ¥738,701 million. However, the company experienced a significant decline in net income attributable to parent company shareholders, which fell by 32.7% to ¥60,358 million.

The company’s operating income saw a notable rise of 22.2% to ¥46,648 million, and ordinary income increased by 5.8% to ¥52,910 million. Despite the positive movement in sales and operating income, comprehensive income dropped by 52.9% to ¥29,420 million, indicating challenges in maintaining profitability. Segment-wise, the Life & Healthcare division showed a strong performance with a significant increase in segment income.

Looking ahead, Dai Nippon Printing Co. forecasts a modest growth in net sales for the full fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, with expectations set at ¥1,500,000 million, a 2.9% increase from the previous year. The company remains cautiously optimistic about its future performance, focusing on strategic initiatives to enhance its market position and drive sustainable growth.

data.title: Yakult Honsha Reports Decline in Q2 Earnings
data.description:
Yakult Honsha Co ( (YKLTF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Yakult Honsha Co presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Yakult Honsha Co., Ltd, a prominent player in the food and beverage industry, is renowned for its production and sale of probiotic products, including the famous Yakult fermented milk drink, with operations spanning globally.

In its latest earnings report for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, Yakult Honsha Co. reported a decline in both sales and profits compared to the previous year. The company faced challenges in various markets, leading to a decrease in net sales by 5.5% to 241,174 million yen, and a drop in operating profit by 25% to 25,326 million yen.

The report highlighted that the company’s performance was impacted by a tough market environment, including increased competition and rising prices. In Japan, sales in the food and beverages segment decreased by 4.1%, while the Americas saw a significant drop of 11.8%. However, the European market showed resilience with a slight increase in sales by 0.1%. The company’s strategic efforts included launching new flavors and enhancing sales promotions, yet these were not enough to offset the overall decline.

Looking ahead, Yakult Honsha Co. has revised its financial forecasts for the fiscal year 2025, anticipating lower net sales, operating income, and ordinary income than previously expected. Despite these challenges, the company remains committed to its long-term vision and continues to focus on expanding its global presence and product offerings.

data.title: Siemens Energy Reports Strong Q4 2025 Performance
data.description:
Siemens Energy Ag ( (SMEGF) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Siemens Energy Ag presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Siemens Energy AG is a leading global energy technology company headquartered in Munich, Germany, specializing in the generation, transmission, and storage of energy, with a focus on sustainable and innovative solutions across multiple sectors.

In its latest earnings report for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025, Siemens Energy announced a strong performance, achieving a significant milestone with quarterly revenue surpassing €10 billion for the first time. The company also reported a return to profitability, marking a notable turnaround from previous losses.

Key highlights from the report include a 9.7% increase in revenue compared to the previous year, driven by exceptional performance in Grid Technologies and Gas Services. The company recorded a net income of €236 million, a significant improvement from a net loss of €254 million in the same quarter last year. Siemens Energy’s order backlog reached a record high of €138 billion, reflecting strong demand across its business segments.

Siemens Energy’s strategic focus on operational efficiency and market expansion has resulted in a robust financial performance for the entire fiscal year 2025, with a 15.2% increase in revenue and a net income of €1,685 million. The company’s commitment to shareholder value is underscored by its proposal to resume dividend payments, reflecting confidence in its future growth prospects.

Looking ahead, Siemens Energy is optimistic about the continued favorable trends in the energy sector, forecasting revenue growth and improved profit margins for fiscal year 2026. The company aims to capitalize on the increasing demand for energy infrastructure and sustainable technologies, positioning itself for sustained growth and profitability in the coming years.

P3 Health Partners Inc. is a patient-centered and physician-led population health management company that focuses on improving healthcare outcomes through value-based care coordination and administrative services. The company operates in the healthcare sector, managing the care of thousands of patients across four states in the United States.

In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, P3 Health Partners highlighted continued operational progress and the expansion of its Care Enablement Model. Despite a transitional year, the company identified a significant opportunity for EBITDA expansion, ranging from $120 to $170 million, which is expected to strengthen its path to profitability.

Key financial metrics for the third quarter showed a decrease in average at-risk membership by 10% and a 5% decline in total revenue, attributed to intentional network and payer rationalization. The company reported a medical margin of $4.4 million and an adjusted EBITDA loss of $45.9 million. Despite these challenges, P3 Health Partners noted stable medical cost trends and improved per-member funding.

Looking ahead, P3 Health Partners remains focused on executing its strategic initiatives to achieve sustainable profitability by 2026. The company is optimistic about its ability to capitalize on identified EBITDA expansion opportunities, despite the current financial challenges.

data.title: Nauticus Robotics Reports Growth Amid Financial Challenges
data.description:
Nauticus Robotics Inc. ( (KITT) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Nauticus Robotics Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Nauticus Robotics Inc. is a developer of ocean robots and software solutions for the offshore energy and national security sectors, known for its innovative autonomous underwater vehicles and robotic systems.

In its latest earnings report, Nauticus Robotics Inc. highlighted significant growth in its assets and revenue, alongside strategic moves such as the acquisition of SeaTrepid International LLC to enhance its technological capabilities.

The company reported a substantial increase in total assets, rising from $22.7 million at the end of 2024 to $42.8 million by September 2025, driven by an increase in cash and cash equivalents and the addition of goodwill from the SeaTrepid acquisition. Revenue for the nine months ending September 2025 was $4.2 million, a significant increase from $1.3 million in the same period of 2024, primarily from service contracts. However, the company also reported a net loss of $21.7 million for the nine-month period, reflecting ongoing challenges in covering operating expenses and managing liabilities.

Nauticus Robotics Inc. continues to face liquidity challenges, with all outstanding notes payable reclassified as short-term due to maturity. The management is actively seeking refinancing options to address these obligations and maintain liquidity. Despite the financial hurdles, the company remains focused on integrating its AI-driven autonomy software into SeaTrepid’s ROV fleet to enhance operational performance and efficiency.

Looking ahead, Nauticus Robotics Inc. is committed to leveraging its technological advancements and strategic acquisitions to strengthen its market position. The management remains optimistic about securing necessary financing to support its operations and drive future growth.

data.title: Net Power Inc. Expands Clean Power Strategy
data.description:
Net Power Inc. ( (NPWR) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Net Power Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Net Power Inc., an energy technology company, is focused on transforming natural gas into the lowest cost form of clean firm power, operating primarily in the energy sector with a unique emphasis on carbon capture technologies.

In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, Net Power Inc. highlighted its strategic shift towards expanding its clean power projects using gas turbines with post-combustion carbon capture (PCC) technology, while continuing to develop its proprietary oxy-combustion technology.

Key financial and strategic highlights include a partnership with Entropy Inc. to deploy PCC technology in the U.S., progress on clean firm power hubs in the Permian Basin and northern MISO, and advancements in oxy-combustion testing at their La Porte facility. The company also reported a strong financial position with $424 million in cash, cash equivalents, and investments, despite a non-cash impairment of its oxy-combustion technology assets.

Looking forward, Net Power plans to optimize capital allocation to focus on near-term power projects with Entropy, while maintaining its leadership in oxy-combustion technology. The company remains committed to meeting the growing demand for clean firm power, leveraging its strategic partnerships and technological advancements.

data.title: Roadzen Inc. Shows Strong Q2 Growth and Strategic Expansion
data.description:
Roadzen, Inc. Class A ( (RDZN) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Roadzen, Inc. Class A presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Roadzen Inc., a global leader in AI at the convergence of insurance and mobility, builds technology that helps insurers, automakers, and fleets predict and prevent risk, automate claims, and deliver seamless insurance experiences.

In its latest earnings report, Roadzen Inc. announced a significant improvement in its financial performance for the second quarter, with revenue reaching $13.7 million, marking a 15.2% increase from the previous year. The company also reported its fifth consecutive quarter of adjusted EBITDA improvement and a substantial reduction in net loss by 90.3% year-over-year.

Key financial highlights include a 25.9% sequential revenue increase, a record six-month revenue of $24.5 million, and a narrowed net loss of $2.1 million compared to $21.8 million in the prior year. Roadzen also strengthened its balance sheet by raising over $9 million in additional capital and securing a debt extension agreement, enhancing its financial flexibility. Strategic wins include EU regulatory validation for DrivebuddyAI and a major European OEM insurance mandate.

Roadzen’s strategic initiatives are bolstered by partnerships and acquisitions, including a definitive agreement to acquire a majority interest in a U.S. commercial auto Managing General Underwriter. These moves are expected to reinforce its position as a global leader in AI-driven insurance and mobility solutions.

Looking ahead, Roadzen’s management remains optimistic about sustained growth, driven by ongoing AI-driven efficiencies, targeted expense optimization, and strategic partnerships. The company aims to achieve operational cash flow breakeven and continue its momentum in the second half of fiscal 2026.

Actelis Networks, Inc. is a leader in providing hybrid fiber-copper, cyber-hardened networking solutions for IoT and broadband applications, serving sectors such as government, military, and telecom. The company has reported its financial results for the third quarter of 2025, highlighting a significant increase in customer bookings and a strategic focus on expanding its Federal and Military market reach. Despite a soft quarter in Federal revenue, Actelis nearly doubled its customer bookings from the previous quarter, entering the fourth quarter with a stronger backlog. The company is on track with its reorganization plan aimed at reducing operating expenses by 15-20% annually. Looking forward, Actelis is poised to leverage its reorganization efforts and strategic hires to enhance its market position and financial performance.

data.title: Forte Biosciences Reports Increased R&D Costs Amid Clinical Progress
data.description:
Forte Biosciences Inc. ( (FBRX) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Forte Biosciences Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Forte Biosciences Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing FB102, a proprietary anti-CD122 monoclonal antibody therapeutic candidate for autoimmune and autoimmune-related indications, with its headquarters in Dallas, Texas, and its stock traded on Nasdaq under the symbol FBRX.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, Forte Biosciences Inc. highlighted significant advancements in its clinical trials, including the commencement of a Phase 2 study for celiac disease following promising Phase 1b results. The company also continues to develop FB102 for non-segmental vitiligo and alopecia areata.

Financially, Forte Biosciences reported a net loss of $17.7 million for the third quarter of 2025, compared to a loss of $8.4 million in the same period last year. The company’s operating expenses increased significantly, primarily due to heightened research and development costs, which rose to $15.1 million from $5.7 million in the previous year. Despite these losses, the company successfully raised $75 million through a public offering, bolstering its cash reserves to $93.4 million.

Looking forward, Forte Biosciences plans to continue its focus on advancing FB102 through clinical trials, with management expressing confidence in the company’s ability to fund operations for at least the next twelve months. However, the company acknowledges the need for additional capital to sustain long-term growth and development efforts.

data.title: Sensei Biotherapeutics Reports Strategic Shift in Q3 2025
data.description:
Sensei Biotherapeutics, Inc. ( (SNSE) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Sensei Biotherapeutics, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Sensei Biotherapeutics, Inc. is a clinical stage biotechnology company focused on developing next-generation therapeutics for cancer patients, utilizing its TMAb™ platform to create conditionally active biologics targeting the tumor microenvironment.

In its third quarter 2025 earnings report, Sensei Biotherapeutics announced significant strategic changes, including the discontinuation of its lead product candidate, solnerstotug, and a comprehensive review of strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value.

The company reported a cash position of $25 million as of September 30, 2025, down from $41.3 million at the end of 2024. Research and development expenses decreased to $2.5 million from $4.6 million in the same quarter of the previous year, while general and administrative expenses also fell to $2.3 million from $3.2 million. The net loss for the quarter was $4.6 million, an improvement from the $7.3 million loss in the third quarter of 2024.

As part of its strategic review, Sensei has implemented a 65% workforce reduction to conserve cash and is exploring options such as asset sales, licensing, collaborations, or a potential sale or merger of the company.

Looking forward, Sensei Biotherapeutics is focused on navigating its strategic review process to identify opportunities that could enhance shareholder value, while maintaining compliance with regulatory and financial obligations.

data.title: bioAffinity Technologies Reports Strong Growth in Lung Test Revenue
data.description:

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

bioAffinity Technologies, Inc. is a biotechnology company specializing in noninvasive diagnostics for early-stage lung cancer and other lung diseases, with its flagship product being the CyPath® Lung test.

In its third quarter of 2025, bioAffinity Technologies reported a significant increase in CyPath® Lung testing revenue, despite an overall decrease in total revenue due to strategic shifts in its service offerings.

The company saw an 86% increase in CyPath® Lung revenues year-over-year, driven by higher test volumes and increased clinical adoption, particularly within the Veterans Administration. Despite a decrease in total revenue to $1.5 million, the company raised $10.4 million from equity transactions to support its operations and growth. Operating expenses were reduced by 16% due to cost-saving measures, although the net loss widened to $5.1 million, primarily due to changes in the fair value of warrants issued.

Looking ahead, bioAffinity Technologies remains focused on expanding the adoption of CyPath® Lung and enhancing its market presence, supported by new board appointments and an expanded patent portfolio. The company’s strategic actions are aimed at streamlining operations and focusing on high-margin diagnostics to drive future growth.

Galectin Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for fibrotic diseases and cancer by targeting galectin proteins. In its latest earnings report for the quarter ended September 30, 2025, the company reported a net loss of $8.2 million, a decrease from the $11.2 million loss in the same period last year. The company’s total operating expenses were significantly reduced to $4.2 million from $9.1 million, primarily due to a decrease in research and development expenses.

Looking ahead, Galectin Therapeutics is optimistic about its ability to continue its operations through June 2026, supported by its current cash reserves and the availability of its line of credit. Smith-Midland Corporation, a key player in the construction, transportation, and utility industries, specializes in the development and manufacturing of precast concrete products and systems. The company operates three manufacturing facilities and offers a diverse range of products including the patented SlenderWall and J-J Hooks Safety Barrier.

In its third quarter of 2025, Smith-Midland reported a notable increase in product sales by 11%, despite a slight decline in overall revenue to $21.5 million from $23.6 million in the previous year. Despite the decline in revenue, the company maintained a positive net income of $58,352, although this was a significant drop from the $292,379 reported in the same period last year.

The company’s financial performance was marked by a reduction in system sales revenue, which fell to $86,927 from $615,160 in the previous year, while maintenance revenue increased to $1.47 million, making up a larger portion of total revenues. Operating expenses saw an increase, primarily due to higher selling, general, and administrative costs, which impacted the overall income from operations. Despite these challenges, Table Trac managed to improve its cash position significantly, ending the period with $6.11 million in cash and cash equivalents, up from $2.26 million at the end of 2024.

Table Trac’s strategic focus on maintaining a strong cash position and managing its operating expenses reflects its commitment to navigating through a challenging market environment. The company’s efforts in expanding its maintenance revenue and managing its financial resources effectively are key highlights of the quarter.

Looking forward, Table Trac’s management remains cautiously optimistic about the company’s ability to sustain its financial health and continue delivering value to its stakeholders, despite the ongoing challenges in the casino management systems market.

Sigma Lithium has also made strides in deleveraging, reducing its short-term trade finance debt by 48% throughout the year.

data.title: BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics Reports Q3 2025 Financials and Updates
data.description:

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics Inc. is a pioneering company in the biotechnology sector, focusing on the development of adult stem cell therapies for neurodegenerative diseases. The company’s proprietary NurOwn® platform is designed to deliver targeted biological signals to modulate neuroinflammation and promote neuroprotection.

In its latest earnings report for the third quarter of 2025, BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics announced significant progress in its clinical trials and financial performance. The company is preparing to initiate a Phase 3b study of its lead investigational therapy, NurOwn, for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), following clearance from the U.S. FDA. This study aims to provide confirmatory data to support a potential Biologics License Application (BLA).

Key financial highlights from the report include a reduction in net loss, which stood at approximately $2.1 million for the quarter, compared to $2.7 million in the same period last year. The company’s general and administrative expenses also decreased significantly, from $2.0 million in the third quarter of 2024 to $1.1 million in 2025. However, the company’s cash position remains a concern, with cash and cash equivalents totaling only $0.23 million as of September 30, 2025.

Additionally, BrainStorm is advancing its clinical programs with the upcoming Phase 3b ENDURANCE study, expected to enroll around 200 participants. This trial will further assess the long-term safety and efficacy of NurOwn in ALS patients. The company is also engaging with the ALS community, acknowledging a Citizen Petition filed with the FDA, which highlights the ongoing interest in NurOwn’s potential therapeutic benefits.

Looking ahead, BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics remains committed to advancing its clinical programs and stabilizing its financial situation. The management is optimistic about the potential of NurOwn to become a valuable treatment for ALS, pending regulatory approval, and continues to work closely with clinical sites and manufacturing partners to ensure operational readiness.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, Pedevco Corp. reported a decline in revenue and net income compared to the previous year, with oil and gas sales totaling $6.961 million, down from $9.050 million in the same period in 2024. Key financial metrics indicate a net loss of $325,000 for the quarter, attributed to lower oil and gas sales and increased operating expenses, including a $907,000 impairment of oil and gas properties. Despite the challenges, the company continues to invest in its assets, with $17.22 million in capital costs incurred for drilling and completion operations in the Permian Basin and D-J Basin. Looking forward, Pedevco Corp. aims to enhance its asset base and explore strategic opportunities to drive growth, while addressing ongoing legal challenges and optimizing its financial position.

Benitec Biopharma Inc. is a biotechnology company specializing in the development of genetic medicines using its proprietary ‘Silence and Replace’ DNA-directed RNA interference platform, which combines RNA interference with gene therapy to target disease-causing genes. In its recent earnings report for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, Benitec Biopharma reported a net loss of $8.965 million, an increase from the $5.059 million loss in the same quarter of the previous year. data.title: Journey Medical Corporation Reports Strong Q3 2025 Growth
data.description:
Fortress Biotech Inc ( (FBIO) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Fortress Biotech Inc presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Journey Medical Corporation is a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company that specializes in selling and marketing FDA-approved prescription products for dermatological conditions. Based in Scottsdale, Arizona, the company is known for its efficient sales and marketing model and its portfolio of eight branded prescription drugs.

In the third quarter of 2025, Journey Medical Corporation reported net revenues of $17.6 million, marking a 21% increase from the previous year. The company’s growth was significantly driven by its product Emrosi™, which saw a 146% increase in total prescriptions and generated $4.9 million in net sales. The company also highlighted the clinical differentiation of Emrosi, which was validated through a Phase 3 efficacy analysis.

Key financial metrics for the quarter included a gross margin of 67.4%, slightly lower than the previous year’s 69.4% due to one-time non-operational adjustments in 2024. Selling, general, and administrative expenses rose by 6% to $12.1 million, primarily due to the launch and commercialization of Emrosi. The company reported a net loss of $2.3 million, an improvement from the $2.4 million loss in the same quarter of the previous year. Notably, Adjusted EBITDA improved to $1.7 million from $0.3 million in the prior year.

Journey Medical’s recent corporate highlights include expanded payer access for Emrosi, now covering over 100 million commercial lives in the U.S., and the presentation of efficacy data at a major dermatology conference. The company’s cash and cash equivalents increased to $24.9 million as of September 30, 2025, up from $20.3 million at the end of 2024.

Looking ahead, Journey Medical’s management remains optimistic about the continued growth of Emrosi and its established dermatology commercial infrastructure, which they believe will generate significant operating leverage. The company is poised to strengthen its position in the dermatology market with its innovative products and strategic initiatives.
